name: Oregon Courts
description: great lighting for night games.  Courts are pretty new and in good shape
open_play_schedule: Usually people playing in the mornings and evenings.  Friday & Saturday, 25-30 people 4 on 4 off rules apply.  everyone is very nice and all levels welcome

name: Washington Park
description: Washington Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Alamogordo, NM. There are 9 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights, wheelchair accessibility, and restrooms.
